get.description: List the canonical versioned definition of every Logic metric.
Get the full versioned definition of one Logic metric.
List all pending draft versions for a Logic metric.

schema.title: Response List Logic Drafts Logic  Logic Id  Drafts Get

get.description: List all pending draft versions across every Logic metric.

schema.title: Response List All Drafts Logic Drafts All Get

post.description: Promote a draft version of a Logic metric to live (human gate).
Reject a draft version of a Logic metric (human gate).

get.description: Return the hash-chain audit trail for one Logic metric.

schema.title: Response Get Logic Audit Logic  Logic Id  Audit Get

post.description: Register a tracker connection after testing the token.

get.description: List all registered tracker connections.

delete.description: Remove a tracker connection. Cached tasks are NOT deleted (stale-gate).

post.description: Trigger a task pull for a registered tracker.

get.description: List cached tasks with optional filters.

schema.title: Response List Tasks Endpoint Tasks Get

get.description: Pre-aggregated facet counts for the right-panel navigator.
Tasks grouped by their linked metric (the 'By Goals' view).

post.description: Link a task to a Logic (eigenheim-native data).

delete.description: Remove the link between a task and a Logic.

get.description:
OKR tree: Objectives with KRs, each KR carrying live value, target,
comparison, status, progress, gap, trace_ref, and task_count.
List Objectives (lightweight, no KR computation).

schema.title: Response List Objectives Endpoint Objectives Get

get.description: Get one Objective with its KRs (live-computed).

patch.description: Update an Objective's title and/or period.

delete.description: Delete an Objective and all its KRs.

post.description: Create a KR under an Objective.

get.description: Get one KR with live-computed value, status, progress, gap, trace_ref.

patch.description: Update a KR's fields. Partial update: only supplied fields change.

get.description:
List hypotheses with optional filters.

status: proposed | testing | confirmed | rejected (omit = all).
logic_id: filter to hypotheses linked to a specific metric (omit = all).

post.description: Create a hypothesis (human path; source='user', status='proposed').

get.description: Get one hypothesis by id.

patch.description: Advance the status of a hypothesis (human-only gate).

get.description: List all decisions, newest first.

post.description: Create a decision, optionally capturing the current values of listed metrics.

get.description: Get one decision with its full captured metric snapshot.

patch.description: Partial update of a decision's title, rationale, or status.

delete.description: Delete a decision and all its captured metric snapshot rows.

get.description: List all RICE items sorted by computed score descending.
Get one RICE item with its computed score and resolved Reach.

patch.description: Partial update of a RICE item. Returns the item with recomputed score.

post.description: Create an MCP key. Returns the raw key ONCE; only the HMAC hash is stored.

get.description: List non-revoked MCP keys (metadata only, no hashes or raw keys).

schema.title: Response List Keys Mcp Keys Get

delete.description: Revoke an MCP key by key_id.

post.description: POST /graph/build — run graphify over a directory and return a run_id.

get.description: GET /graph/{run_id}/json — serve the capped, metric-enriched graph JSON.

LogicDefinitionListItem.title: LogicDefinitionListItem
LogicDefinitionListItem.description: Lightweight definition as returned by GET /definitions (no history).

LogicDefinitionOut.title: LogicDefinitionOut
LogicDefinitionOut.description: Full definition as returned by GET /definitions/{id} (includes history).

ObjectiveSimpleOut.title: ObjectiveSimpleOut
ObjectiveSimpleOut.description: Lightweight objective returned by GET /objectives (no KR computation).

RiceItemOut.title: RiceItemOut
RiceItemOut.description:
RICE item as returned by the compute layer.

Fields are the raw store columns plus the computed fields added by
rice.compute_rice_item. Note: the renderer's api.ts has extra fields
(reach_stale, reach_source, last_known_score, trace_ref) that do NOT
exist in the engine — those are a renderer-side contract drift, fixed in
api.ts to align with this model.
